input_text: Gaji minimum RM1500 tu still tak cukup la bro kalau duduk KL. Sewa rumah je dah RM800. Macam mana nak hidup?
reason: Legitimate complaint about cost of living relative to minimum wage. Expresses economic frustration without targeting any group.

input_text: EPF dividend this year not bad la 5.5%. Better than FD rate. But still worried about retirement enough or not.
reason: Normal financial discussion about EPF returns and retirement planning concerns.

input_text: 公积金的回酬还可以啦，但是够不够退休真的很难说。现在百物涨价，以后更贵吧。
reason: Standard financial concern about EPF returns and rising costs. No harmful content.

input_text: இ.பி.எஃப் பணத்தை வீடு வாங்க பயன்படுத்தலாமா? யாராவது முயற்சி பண்ணிருக்கீங்களா?
reason: Question about using EPF savings for housing purchase. Ordinary financial inquiry.

input_text: Bro EPF i-Akaun tu senang je check, download app dia. Dividend tahun ni okay la比去年好一点
reason: Mixed BM-Chinese casual advice about EPF app. Routine financial discussion.

input_text: Hospital kerajaan punya waiting time memang gila. Pukul 6 pagi dah sampai, jumpa doktor pukul 2 petang. Kesian orang tua kena tunggu lama.
reason: Complaint about public hospital waiting times with empathy for elderly. Legitimate criticism of public services.

input_text: SPM reform long overdue la. Why still memorize everything? Other countries already moved to critical thinking based assessment.
reason: Constructive criticism of education assessment system comparing with international practices.

input_text: 每次下大雨就水灾，尤其是关丹和哥打峇鲁那边。政府有没有长远的防洪计划啊？
reason: Question about government flood mitigation plans. Legitimate concern about recurring natural disasters.

input_text: Grab driver income makin susah bro. Commission tinggi, petrol naik, customer complaint banyak. Gig economy ni memang tak stable.
reason: Commentary on gig economy challenges facing ride-hailing drivers. Normal economic discussion.

input_text: Just switched to Touch n Go eWallet for everything. Parking, toll, groceries. So much easier than cash tbh
reason: Positive personal experience sharing about e-wallet adoption. No harmful content.

input_text: B40 family memang struggle la nak hantar anak tuition. Tuition fee mahal, tapi kalau tak hantar nanti ketinggalan. Dilemma betul.
reason: Expresses empathy for lower-income families facing education costs. Legitimate socioeconomic concern.

input_text: 5G coverage in Malaysia still spotty la. My area in PJ also sometimes no signal. How about rural areas?
reason: Factual observation about 5G network coverage gaps. Normal technology discussion.

input_text: கோப்பி ஒரு கப் RM3 ஆகிடுச்சு. முன்னாடி RM1.50 தான். எல்லாமே விலை ஏறுது, சம்பளம் மட்டும் அப்படியே.
reason: Complaint about rising food prices relative to stagnant wages. Common cost-of-living concern.

input_text: Haze season datang lagi 😩 API dah 150+ kat Selangor. Budak2 sekolah kena pakai mask. Bila la nak selesai masalah ni
reason: Frustration about recurring haze problem affecting schoolchildren. Environmental concern.

input_text: Property prices in KL damn jialat. RM500k can only get small condo. Young people how to afford? No wonder birth rate dropping.
reason: Commentary on housing affordability crisis using Malaysian English. Legitimate economic concern.

input_text: 马来西亚的数码经济发展得不错，但是很多小贩和巴刹的安哥安娣还是不会用e-wallet。需要更多培训。
reason: Observation about digital economy adoption gap among older market vendors. Constructive suggestion.

input_text: Teacher shortage kat sekolah luar bandar memang serius. Satu cikgu kena ajar 3-4 subjek. Kasihan cikgu, kasihan murid.
reason: Concern about teacher shortages in rural schools. Legitimate education policy discussion.

input_text: Recycling bin kat apartment I semua campur jadi satu je. What's the point of separating kalau collector campak semua sekali?
reason: Mixed BM-EN frustration about ineffective recycling systems. Valid environmental criticism.

input_text: Mental health awareness in Malaysia dah improve sikit la. At least now people more open to talk about it. Dulu mesti kena label gila.
reason: Positive observation about improving mental health awareness. Constructive social commentary.

input_text: படிப்புக்கு PTPTN கடன் வாங்கினா, வேலை கிடைச்ச உடனே கட்ட ஆரம்பிக்கணும். இல்லனா interest accumulate ஆகும்.
reason: Advice about repaying PTPTN student loans promptly. Helpful financial guidance.

input_text: KWSP keluarkan duit time COVID tu memang tolong ramai orang. Tapi sekarang akaun 1 ramai dah kosong. Macam mana nak pencen?
reason: Reflects on COVID EPF withdrawal policy consequences. Legitimate retirement concern.

input_text: The digital scam situation in Malaysia is really bad. My mum almost kena last week. Fake bank call asking for TAC number.
reason: Sharing scam awareness experience to warn others. Public safety information.

input_text: 槟城的交通越来越塞了，LRT说了很多年还是没有。几时才会有公共交通的改善啊？
reason: Complaint about Penang traffic and delayed public transport projects. Normal infrastructure criticism.

input_text: STEM education kena push lagi kuat. Budak2 Malaysia boleh compete globally kalau ada proper foundation dari sekolah rendah.
reason: Advocacy for stronger STEM education. Constructive suggestion for education improvement.

input_text: Flood in Kelantan every year same story. Build better drainage system la. People there suffer every monsoon season.
reason: Criticism of flood management infrastructure with call for better solutions. Legitimate concern.

input_text: Deforestation kat Sabah Sarawak ni bukan cerita baru. Orang asli hilang tanah, haiwan pun hilang habitat. Kena seimbangkan pembangunan dgn alam.
reason: Environmental concern about deforestation impacting indigenous communities and wildlife. Balanced perspective.

input_text: 我觉得马来西亚的公立医院医生其实很厉害，就是人手不够，等太久了。应该请更多医生。
reason: Praises public hospital doctors while noting understaffing issues. Constructive healthcare feedback.

input_text: Gig economy workers patut ada EPF and SOCSO jugak. Diorang pun pekerja, deserve basic protection.
reason: Advocacy for social protection for gig workers. Constructive labor policy suggestion.

input_text: நம்ம ஊர் பள்ளிக்கூடத்தில் computer lab இருக்கு, ஆனா computer எல்லாம் old model. Internet connection-ம் slow. எப்படி STEM கற்பிக்கிறது?
reason: Concern about outdated school technology infrastructure for STEM education. Legitimate education criticism.

input_text: Siapa dah try MySejahtera for health records? Okay tak the app now? Last time laggy gila 😂
reason: Casual inquiry about government health app usability. Normal technology discussion.

input_text: M40 group ni macam invisible. Tak cukup miskin nak dapat bantuan, tak cukup kaya nak hidup selesa. Stuck in the middle.
reason: Describes M40 income group struggles. Common socioeconomic commentary without targeting anyone.

input_text: Malaysia needs more vocational training paths. Not everyone needs to go university. Skilled trades also can earn good money.
reason: Advocacy for vocational education as alternative pathway. Constructive education policy opinion.

input_text: 巴生谷的房价太高了，年轻人根本买不起。政府的可负担房屋计划PR1MA有用吗？有人申请过吗？
reason: Question about housing affordability and government housing schemes. Normal discussion.

input_text: Hari ni bawa mak pergi hospital kerajaan. Doctor bagus, nurse semua friendly. Cuma waiting time tu memang kena sabar la.
reason: Balanced personal experience at public hospital praising staff while noting wait times.

input_text: Anyone else noticed the e-wallet wars? TnG, Boost, GrabPay, ShopeePay all fighting for market share. Consumer benefits from cashback la at least.
reason: Observation about e-wallet competition in Malaysia. Normal fintech discussion.

input_text: Cuaca panas gila lately. Climate change memang real. Kita kena start buat something, at least reduce plastic usage ke apa ke.
reason: Mixed BM-EN concern about climate change with call for personal action. Constructive environmental advocacy.

input_text: University quota system kena review la. Should be based on merit and need, bukan lain2. Semua anak Malaysia deserve equal chance.
reason: Opinion on university admission quotas favoring merit-based approach. Legitimate education policy critique without incitement.

input_text: இணையதள மோசடி அதிகமாகிடுச்சு. யாரும் OTP number-ஐ share பண்ணாதீங்க. Bank ஒருபோதும் phone-ல கேக்காது.
reason: Online scam awareness advice in Tamil. Public safety information sharing.

input_text: Jalan kat kampung I rosak teruk, penuh lubang. Dah report kat JKR tapi tak ada action. Bandar je cantik, kampung tinggal macam tu.
reason: Complaint about rural road conditions and urban-rural development gap. Legitimate infrastructure concern.

input_text: Just had an amazing nasi lemak for RM3 at the roadside stall. Some things in Malaysia still affordable 😄
reason: Light-hearted positive comment about affordable food. No harmful content whatsoever.

input_text: 现在很多诈骗电话，说你欠税或者包裹有问题。千万不要相信！直接挂电话然后report。
reason: Scam awareness warning in Chinese. Helpful public safety information.

input_text: Anak I masuk sekolah kebangsaan tahun ni. Cikgu dia bagus, dedikasi. Tapi class 40 orang, macam mana nak bagi perhatian?
reason: Concern about class sizes in national schools despite good teachers. Legitimate education feedback.

input_text: Rural broadband coverage still terrible. My cousin in Sabah interior can't even load WhatsApp properly. How to talk about digital economy?
reason: Criticism of rural internet infrastructure. Valid point about digital divide.

input_text: 大马的回收率还是很低。很多人不知道怎么分类垃圾。学校应该从小就教环保意识。
reason: Observation about low recycling rates with constructive suggestion for environmental education.

input_text: Korang perasan tak harga ayam turun sikit? Alhamdulillah. Tapi telur masih mahal. Harap kerajaan monitor harga barang keperluan.
reason: Comment on food prices with hope for government price monitoring. Normal consumer concern.

input_text: Electric vehicle adoption in MY very slow because charging infrastructure not enough. Need more charging stations especially along highways.
reason: Analysis of EV adoption barriers in Malaysia. Constructive technology and infrastructure discussion.

input_text: Penting gila belajar coding sekarang ni. Even budak sekolah rendah pun boleh start dengan Scratch. Future job semua digital dah.
reason: Enthusiasm for coding education for children. Positive STEM advocacy.

input_text: மனநல விழிப்புணர்வு அதிகமாகணும். Depression-க்கு treatment இருக்கு. உதவி கேக்கிறது தவறு இல்லை.
reason: Mental health awareness message encouraging seeking help. Positive public health advocacy.

input_text: Dah la gaji ciput, PTPTN kena bayar, kereta loan kena bayar, rent kena bayar. Fresh grad life in KL is survival mode 😭
reason: Fresh graduate venting about financial pressures. Relatable economic hardship expression.

input_text: Private hospital memang laju service dia, tapi satu visit RM300-500. Rakyat biasa mana mampu. Nasib ada hospital kerajaan.
reason: Comparison of private vs public healthcare costs. Appreciation for public healthcare system.

input_text: KL MRT extension is actually pretty good. Finally can go from Putrajaya to Kwasa Damansara without driving. More lines please!
reason: Positive feedback on MRT expansion with request for more. Normal urban transport discussion.

input_text: 砂拉越很多乡村地区还没有干净的水源供应。都2026年了，这个问题应该优先解决。
reason: Concern about clean water access in rural Sarawak. Legitimate infrastructure development criticism.

input_text: Kerajaan patut bagi insentif lebih pada petani tempatan. Import makanan terlalu banyak, kita kena strengthen food security.
reason: Policy suggestion for agricultural incentives and food security. Constructive economic opinion.

input_text: My school canteen food so expensive now. Nasi goreng RM4.50 for kids? When I was in school it was RM1.50 only.
reason: Complaint about school canteen food prices. Nostalgic comparison with past prices. Normal consumer concern.

input_text: Banyak scammer call pretend jadi polis or Lembaga Hasil. Tolong share awareness pada mak ayah korang. Orang tua senang kena tipu.
reason: Scam awareness PSA urging people to protect elderly family members. Public safety message.

input_text: 现在马来西亚的外卖骑手真的很辛苦，下雨天也要送。平台应该给他们更好的保障和保险。
reason: Empathy for delivery riders and advocacy for better platform worker protections. Constructive labor concern.

input_text: Klinik kesihatan kat area I cuma buka weekday je. Orang kerja macam mana nak pergi? At least buka Saturday morning pun jadi la.
reason: Suggestion for extended clinic hours to serve working people. Constructive healthcare access feedback.

input_text: படிக்கிற பிள்ளைகளுக்கு laptop இல்லை என்றால் online class எப்படி attend பண்றது? Digital divide மிகவும் serious.
reason: Concern about digital divide affecting students without laptops for online learning. Education equity issue.

input_text: Sabah Sarawak infrastructure gap with Semenanjung is real. My friend in Long Pasia still uses generator for electricity.
reason: Highlighting East Malaysia infrastructure gaps. Legitimate development inequality concern.

input_text: Budget 2026 kena fokus pada rakyat marhaen. Subsidi targeted okay, tapi jangan sampai yang betul2 susah tak dapat bantuan.
reason: Opinion on budget priorities and targeted subsidies. Normal fiscal policy discussion.

input_text: Aku rasa UPSR dah dimansuhkan pun bagus. Budak2 terlalu stress dgn exam oriented system. Let them enjoy learning.
reason: Support for UPSR abolishment to reduce exam stress on children. Education reform opinion.

input_text: Malaysia's startup scene getting better. MDEC doing good job supporting tech companies. Hope more VC funding comes in.
reason: Positive assessment of Malaysia's tech startup ecosystem. Normal business discussion.

input_text: 吉隆坡的LRT和MRT真的方便了很多。但是last mile connectivity还是个问题，下了站还是要叫Grab。
reason: Feedback on public transport last-mile connectivity issues. Constructive urban development critique.

input_text: Selalu dengar orang cakap "balik kampung tanam jagung" tapi realiti petani kita income rendah gila. Agriculture sector kena modernize.
reason: Commentary on low agricultural income and need for modernization. Constructive economic observation.

input_text: I think the SST system is okay but can be more transparent. Sometimes don't know why certain items taxed differently.
reason: Mild criticism of tax transparency. Legitimate fiscal policy feedback.

input_text: Program latihan kemahiran TVET tu bagus sebenarnya. Lepasan TVET ramai yang dapat kerja cepat. Kena promote lagi.
reason: Positive view on TVET vocational training programs and employability. Constructive education opinion.

input_text: அரசு மருத்துவமனையில் specialist appointment-க்கு 6 மாதம் காத்திருக்கணும். இது மிகவும் நீண்ட நேரம்.
reason: Complaint about long specialist appointment waiting times at public hospitals. Valid healthcare access concern.

input_text: Weekend market kat Bangsar ni best la. Support local farmers and producers. Harga pun reasonable compared to supermarket.
reason: Positive review of local weekend market supporting local producers. No harmful content.

input_text: Kenapa broadband Malaysia mahal tapi slow? Compare dengan Korea atau Singapore, kita jauh ketinggalan. TNB and TM kena step up.
reason: Criticism of broadband quality and pricing compared to regional competitors. Normal consumer complaint.

input_text: Having a tough time with anxiety lately. Glad that Befrienders Malaysia exists. If you need someone to talk to, call 03-7627 2929.
reason: Mental health support sharing with Befrienders helpline number. Helpful public health information.

input_text: 我孩子的学校老师不够，一个老师教三个班。政府说要请更多老师，但是什么时候才能落实？
reason: Concern about teacher shortage affecting children's education. Legitimate education policy criticism.

input_text: Harga rumah mampu milik RM300k? Mampu milik untuk siapa tu? B40 gaji RM2000 sebulan mana mampu.
reason: Questioning the definition of affordable housing relative to B40 income. Valid economic critique.

input_text: Solar panel installation for houses in Malaysia should get more government incentives. Tropical country, so much sun, why not use it?
reason: Advocacy for solar energy incentives. Constructive environmental and energy policy suggestion.

input_text: Flood relief volunteers in Pahang are heroes la. Every year they come out to help without being asked. Salute!
reason: Praising flood relief volunteers. Positive community spirit recognition.

input_text: Kalau nak kurangkan banjir, stop la tebang pokok sesuka hati. Hutan tu penting untuk serap air. Basic science pun tak faham ke developer ni.
reason: Criticism of deforestation causing floods. Environmental advocacy with frustration at developers.

input_text: JPA scholarship 出来了吗？有没有人知道怎么申请？GPA要多少才有机会？
reason: Inquiry about JPA scholarship application process. Normal education-related question.

input_text: Minimum wage naik, tapi small business owner pun struggle. Kena cari balance la, jangan sampai SME tutup.
reason: Balanced view on minimum wage impact on SMEs. Nuanced economic opinion.

input_text: Korang jangan lupa daftar as voter okay. Undi18 dah boleh. Your vote matters, use it wisely.
reason: Encouraging voter registration under Undi18. Civic participation advocacy.

input_text: Malaysia punya healthcare system actually quite good for the price. Medical tourism pun popular. Cuma public sector overwhelmed la.
reason: Balanced assessment of Malaysia's healthcare system noting both strengths and challenges.

input_text: இன்று school holiday-ல library-க்கு போனேன். நிறைய பிள்ளைகள் வந்திருந்தாங்க. நல்ல அறிகுறி!
reason: Positive observation about children visiting library during school holidays. Wholesome content.

input_text: Malaysia e-commerce market growing fast. Shopee, Lazada semua compete. Good for consumer, banyak discount and free shipping.
reason: Observation about growing e-commerce market competition benefiting consumers. Normal business discussion.

input_text: Pokok sawit memang bagi income pada negara, tapi kena ada sustainable practice. Jangan sampai habitat orang utan musnah.
reason: Balanced view on palm oil industry needing sustainable practices. Constructive environmental opinion.

input_text: Data privacy in Malaysia needs stronger enforcement. PDPA exists but how many companies actually follow it properly?
reason: Criticism of data privacy enforcement. Legitimate technology policy concern.

input_text: 我家附近的pasar malam东西越来越贵了。炒粿条都要RM8了。但是味道还是很好啦哈哈。
reason: Light-hearted comment about rising pasar malam food prices. Casual everyday observation.

input_text: Cikgu2 Malaysia ni underappreciated. Gaji tak seberapa tapi tanggungjawab besar. Kena hargai lebih profession ni.
reason: Appreciation for teachers and concern about their compensation. Positive social commentary.

input_text: TikTok Shop is killing it in Malaysia. Even makcik2 kampung now selling kuih online. Digital economy for everyone!
reason: Positive observation about digital economy inclusivity through social commerce platforms.

input_text: Apahal la grab food delivery fee mahal sangat? Kedai sebelah rumah je pun charge RM5 delivery. Jalan kaki lagi jimat 😅
reason: Humorous complaint about food delivery fees. Everyday consumer gripe.

input_text: படிப்பு முடிச்சு வேலை தேடுறது ரொம்ப கஷ்டம். Experience இல்லனா யாரும் எடுக்க மாட்டாங்க. Entry level job-க்கு கூட 2 years experience கேக்குறாங்க.
reason: Frustration about job market requiring experience for entry-level positions. Common graduate employment concern.

input_text: Projek MRT3 tu elok la teruskan. Public transport lagi banyak lagi bagus. Less cars on the road, less pollution.
reason: Support for MRT3 expansion linking it to environmental benefits. Constructive infrastructure opinion.

input_text: Honestly Malaysia's public university quality is underrated. UKM, UM, USM all ranked well globally. We should be proud.
reason: Positive assessment of Malaysian public universities. National pride in education achievements.

input_text: 网上银行越来越方便了，但是老人家还是喜欢去银行柜台。银行不要关太多分行啦。
reason: Concern about bank branch closures affecting elderly who prefer in-person banking. Inclusive digital transition advocacy.

input_text: I think tabung haji performance tahun ni akan improve. Market conditions better. Hopefully depositors get decent returns.
reason: Optimistic speculation about Tabung Haji investment performance. Normal financial discussion.

input_text: Bus sekolah kat luar bandar banyak yang dah lama, tak maintain. Safety budak2 kena utamakan. Tukar la bus baru.
reason: Concern about school bus safety in rural areas. Child safety advocacy.

input_text: Malaysia should invest more in AI and automation. Other ASEAN countries already ahead. We need to catch up or be left behind.
reason: Advocacy for AI investment to maintain regional competitiveness. Constructive technology policy opinion.

input_text: Mak aku cerita zaman dia dulu masuk kampung tak da tar road pun. Now at least jalan tar ada, tapi still jauh nak compare dgn bandar.
reason: Acknowledges rural development progress while noting urban-rural gap persists. Balanced observation.

input_text: Vegetables mahal gila sekarang, but farmer pun tak dapat harga yang fair. Middleman yang untung besar. Kena ada direct selling platform for farmers.
reason: Commentary on agricultural supply chain pricing with suggestion for direct selling. Constructive economic observation.

input_text: Kerja remote best la. Tak payah commute 2 jam sehari. Tapi tak semua job boleh remote. Kesian factory workers.
reason: Observation about remote work benefits and limitations across different job types. Empathetic commentary.

input_text: MySIPP 2.0 really helping small businesses go online. More government programs like this please. SMEs are backbone of economy.
reason: Positive feedback on government digitalization program for SMEs. Constructive economic opinion.

input_text: Banjir kat KL last week tu sebab longkang tersumbat dgn sampah. Rakyat pun kena jaga kebersihan, bukan salahkan kerajaan je.
reason: Balanced view on flood causes attributing shared responsibility between public and government.

input_text: EPF Account 3 flexible withdrawal is good idea. Sometimes emergency need money fast. Better than pinjam along.
reason: Support for EPF flexible withdrawal as alternative to loan sharks. Constructive financial policy opinion.
